Closes the consumer side of the pdf-render pipeline (v2 PRODUCT.md §505-506). End-to-end pipeline now intact: tRPC create → prisma insert → BullMQ enqueue → worker → status queued→rendering → Puppeteer render → MinIO upload → status=ready → tRPC getDownloadUrl returns `/api/exports/reports/{id}/download` → Route Handler streams the PDF with EXPORT_DOWNLOAD AuditLog. Only the 5.3d admin UI surfaces remain before Item 3 complete.

LAST_DONE:    Sub-batch 5.3c SHIPPED to main via squash-merge. Monorepo total 417→441 (+24 net new for 5.3c). 6 errors encountered + resolved inline: (1) vi.fn().mockImplementation non-constructable → vi.hoisted + FakeS3Client class factory; (2) vi.importActual on route-auth pulls next-auth needing next/headers unavailable in vitest node env → full mock with replicated RouteAuthError class; (3) 429 test needed real TRPCError instance for instanceof match → import from @trpc/server; (4) storage typecheck missing Buffer/process/node:stream types → added @types/node devDep; (5) storage lint 2 errors (no-dynamic-delete + null-overlap) → removed unused restoreEnv helper + dropped null branch from Body undefined check; (6) jobs lint 1 error (async arrow without await in mockUploadPdf impl) → refactored to Promise.resolve. NEXT:         Open a FRESH Claude Code session and say "Start Sub-batch 5.3d" (or "Continue Batch 5 Item 3 — final"). 🎯 Item 3 progress: 3 of ~4 sub-batches shipped (5.3a + 5.3b + 5.3c). Next concrete task is **Sub-batch 5.3d — /[tenant]/exports admin UI list page + status polling + retry mutation + retry button**. Brief shape: (a) New apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/exports/page.tsx — Server Component, RBAC-gated to coordinator+; calls trpc.reportExport.list with paginated DataTable shape; columns: reportType + paperSize + status badge + requestedBy.fullName + createdAt + completedAt + actions. Status badge shows colored chip per status (queued=grey, rendering=blue+spinner, ready=green, failed=red). (b) New apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/exports/components/export-row.tsx — Client Component wrapping each row; for rows in (queued, rendering) status uses trpc.reportExport.pollStatus.useQuery with refetchInterval=3000 to live-update the row state; on transition to ready, swap action cell from spinner to a Download button linking to the row's getDownloadUrl. (c) New apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/exports/components/retry-button.tsx — Client Component; admin-only (role check); calls a NEW reportExport.retry mutation that resets status=queued + nullifies filePath/fileSizeBytes/errorMessage/completedAt + re-enqueues via enqueuePdfRender; jobId pattern `pdf-render:${exportId}` dedupes if a stale job is still in BullMQ (5.3b precedent). (d) Add reportExport.retry to the router (adminProcedure shape mirrors patrol.rebuildTracks 5.2c precedent). (e) Add a "Generate Report" CTA button on patrols/page.tsx (or coverage report area) that calls reportExport.create — currently the create mutation has no UI trigger. Test coverage target: page.test.tsx 4-6 cases (RBAC gate, table renders rows, status badge variant per status, pagination), export-row.test.tsx 3-4 cases (polling enabled when status in-flight, download link surfaces on ready, no polling for terminal states), retry-button.test.tsx 3-4 cases (role gate, mutation call, optimistic UI), reportExport.test.ts +retry coverage 4-5 cases (admin gate, reset+re-enqueue, ordering, audit log) = ~16-19 net new tests bringing monorepo 441 → ~457-460 total. Estimated ~40K main-session tokens. Dispatch path: main-session Opus 4.7 (continues 8-ship precedent). After 5.3d ships → 🎯 Phase 8 Batch 5 Item 3 COMPLETE → 🎯 Phase 8 Batch 5 COMPLETE (all 3 items done: AreaBoundary derivation + PatrolTrack materialization + ReportExport pdf-render pipeline) → Batch 6+ (breaking migrations + user-visible features per POST-ITEM-1 DEFERRED ledger below).

  BREAKING MIGRATIONS (Batch 6+):
